items.title: As Tim Cook steps down, Apple hit record sales — but a chip shortage looms
items.content: Cook warned that Apple is facing supply-chain headwinds from RAMageddon that could impact its business.

items.title: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
items.content: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.

items.title: Apple loses bid to pause App Store fee changes as case heads to Supreme Court
items.content: Apple lost its bid to pause court-ordered App Store payment changes, keeping external purchase links in place as its case with Epic heads toward the Supreme Court.

items.title: Paragon is not collaborating with Italian authorities probing spyware attacks, report says
items.content: Despite promising to help determine what happened with the hacks targeting journalists and activists in Italy, Israeli American spyware maker Paragon has reportedly not respon

items.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
items.content: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models

items.title: Musk v. Altman is just getting started
items.content: Elon Musk spent the better part of three days on the witness stand this week in his lawsuit against OpenAI, and it’s already getting messy. Emails, texts, and his own tweets a

items.title: Satya Nadella says he’s ready to ‘exploit’ the new OpenAI deal
items.content: Microsoft gets to offer OpenAI's tech to its cloud customers and doesn't have to pay for it. "We fully plan to exploit it," Nadella said.

items.title: Microsoft says it has over 20M paid Copilot users, and they really are using it
items.content: Despite the lingering perception that no one really uses Copilot, Microsoft said on Wednesday that the number of users and engagement is growing.

items.title: Confusion in Strait of Hormuz Leaves Shipping Firms Guessing
items.content: The United States vowed to help tankers navigate the perilous conditions that have kept them stranded in the Persian Gulf, but it remained unclear if companies would try to ge

items.title: What Was Discussed at Google’s White House Meeting About A.I.
items.content: The technology giant met with administration officials last week to address a growing concern in Washington: insufficient computing power for artificial intelligence.

items.title: GameStop Proposes Acquiring eBay for $55 Billion
items.content: Analysts question the feasibility of this long-shot bid by the video game retailer to acquire the much larger online marketplace.

items.title: A 22,000-Home Community Is Being Built in a 5,000-Person Town
items.content: Chatham Park, a master-planned community in Pittsboro, N.C., is expected to expand the town to 60,000 people when completed.
